# McpServer.DiscoverMeta property

Optional result-level `_meta` attached to the `server/discover` result (§5.3.2, R-5.3.2-k): arbitrary protocol-defined or vendor metadata. `null` (the default) attaches none.

```csharp
public JsonObject? DiscoverMeta { get; set; }
```
